description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Release Linux that triggers on push events with any tag. The workflow should run on an ubuntu-16.04 environment, checking out the code, initializing submodules, installing Python 3.7 and Qt, then building the project with CMake. It should determine the version and whether it's a beta release, create an AppImage package, and archive the full source code. Finally, it should create a draft GitHub release with the AppImage and source archive, marking it as a prerelease if the version is not stable.
